mustSupport: The batch defines reusable support response patterns rather than product copy or meeting ops.
Macros should be grouped by failure mode.
Each macro should contain symptom, likely cause, next check, and escalation rule.

criticalChecks: Do not force-fit this batch into product-writing-playbook.
Any inbox result here should count as a miss on new-topic creation.
annotationNotes: This is the seed corpus new-topic holdout case.
The batch is cohesive and durable enough to justify a new topic.
